title: Fiat 130 L2H2 Ducato Transporter
remarks:
Note on the article description
The article description is for general orientation and was partly created automatically. The images provided are decisive for condition, design and technical data. Deviations from information in individual details are possible. If you have any questions, please contact us before submitting your bid.
additional_information:
Well-maintained Fiat Ducato high-capacity transporter from 1st owner with a clean overall impression and good commercial vehicle equipment. Interior neat, seats in good condition and cargo space with normal commercial vehicle wear. The body shows no major visible damage, slight signs of use, dirt and subtle residues of former lettering are present. The vehicle is suitable as a craftsman's vehicle, transporter or base for expansion projects. Permissible total mass 3,300 kg, axle load front/rear axle 1,750/1,900 kg.

Equipment:
· Navigation system
· Rear view camera
· Automatic climate control
· Cruise control
· Trailer hitch
· Fiat Professional Loading Floor
· Airline rails in the hold
· 3-seater cab
· 270° opening rear doors
· Side sliding door

Notes:
· 1. Hand with only one letter entry
· Liability for material defects and return excluded
· Normal signs of wear in the cargo area and on exterior attachments
· Trailer hitch with visible surface rust

Neat, well-maintained and well-equipped Ducato L2H2 with practical equipment, high usability and attractive base for commercial, transport or expansion.

Contact:
Dennis Blos
d.blos@tbauctions.com
0173 6040 381

title: 1968 Fiat Berlina 1100R, AM-12-29
remarks:
Signs of wear by age and mileage. Come to the viewing day for your own assessment.
You must check all information in the description yourself during the viewing day for operation and presence. 
No possibility of complaint.
additional_information:
About this Collectable

The Fiat 1100 Berlina was an important model in the European middle class segment in the 50s and 60s. With its practical design, comfortable handling and reliable technology, the 1100 managed to appeal to a wide audience. The R version stood for Rinnovata and brought several improvements compared to previous generations.

This example is a 1968 Fiat 1100 R Berlina, finished in blue. As one of the last versions of the 1100 series, this model combines classic lines with a mature and timeless look. The Berlina body offers a surprising amount of space and makes the car suitable for relaxed classic driving.

Thanks to its lightweight construction, simple technology and rear-wheel drive, the Fiat 1100 offers a quiet and authentic driving experience. The understated design and decent build quality provide charm and ease of use. An accessible classic that beautifully reflects the character of the 60s.

Technical details

The Fiat 1100 R is equipped with a 1.1-liter four-cylinder gasoline engine, coupled with a manual transmission. The rear-wheel drive and comfortable tuning make it pleasant to use, both for touring and classic daily transport.

Equipment

1.1-liter four-cylinder gasoline engine

Manual transmission

Rear-wheel drive

Blue lacquer

Berlina body
